title: AMD Athlon: AMD’s game changing CPU from 1999
content:
On June 23, 1999, AMD announced its much anticipated Athlon CPU, the successor to its very successful K6. It launched less than two months later, on August 9, 1999. The Athlon proved to be the CPU that separated AMD from

The post AMD Athlon: AMD’s game changing CPU from 1999 appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
